text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see... El was talking in her sleep last
night, and I couldn't help but be a little curious...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She must've been having the buffet of her
dreams, because she kept calling out things like
"a la plancha" and "gazpacho."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's incredible how she can muster that much
energy even while sleeping...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So you see, I didn't catch a wink all night... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Grass Wonder needs more sleep.
